## Summary
Describe the change and the repo area it affects.

## What changed
List the main documentation, specification, ADR, diagram, or conformance updates in this PR.

## Why this change is needed
Describe the problem, ambiguity, or risk being addressed.

## Review guidance
Point reviewers to the most important files, sections, or commits.

## Privacy and security implications
Describe any impact on:
- disclosure
- anti-correlation
- proof-binding
- status or recovery
- verifier restraint

## Governance and conformance implications
Describe whether:
- verifier obligations changed
- exception handling changed
- conformance or privacy-negative tests changed

## Cross-document consistency
Confirm any related updates made in this PR:
- specs
- architecture docs
- ADRs
- diagrams
- conformance materials
- issue references

## Validation
Describe how you checked the change. For example:
- link checks or rendering review
- cross-reference review
- terminology consistency review
- conformance criteria review
